pages.title: Daniel L. Myers Portfolio
preview:
I build scalable, responsive, and user-centered interfaces that connect strong visual execution
              with clean engineering. My focus is frontend architecture, component-based development,
              accessibility, and polished interaction design using React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS —
              backed by Python APIs and full-stack workflows that bring real functionality to the UI.

I’m strongest where design, usability, and engineering meet. My work centers on building interfaces
              that are scalable in code, intuitive in use, and polished in execution.

While frontend is my core lane, I bring full-stack awareness through Python, APIs, and data-driven workflows,
              which helps me build UI that is not only visually strong, but connected to real application behavior.

I build responsive, maintainable interfaces with a focus on component systems,
              accessibility, performance, and scalable frontend structure.

I translate product and visual requirements into polished user experiences
              with clean implementation across React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

I connect frontend experiences to backend services through Python APIs,
              structured data workflows, and full-stack integration that supports real products.
“Daniel delivered on time with exceptional polish. The site felt fast, modern, and easy to use.”
“Very professional, responsive, and detail-oriented. The final site was clean and easy for customers to navigate.”
“Communication was clear and consistent. The design direction matched exactly what we wanted, and updates were fast.”

pages.title: Daniel Myers | Engineering Applications
preview:
These projects represent more than individual tools — they show how I think through architecture,
          user needs, logic, and maintainability across different languages and environments.

Together, they demonstrate experience with Python, JavaScript, C++, Java, APIs, UI patterns,
          automation workflows, and full-stack problem solving.
pages.html:
A collection of applications that highlight how I solve problems across the stack —
        from UI-focused projects and frontend interaction patterns to Python automation,
        API integrations, systems logic, and language-driven engineering fundamentals.

These projects represent more than individual tools — they show how I think through architecture,
          user needs, logic, and maintainability across different languages and environments.

Together, they demonstrate experience with Python, JavaScript, C++, Java, APIs, UI patterns,
          automation workflows, and full-stack problem solving.

pages.title: Daniel Myers | UI Engineering Web Work
preview:
A collection of client websites and production builds that highlight responsive UI engineering,
            CMS implementation, component-based frontend work, and full-stack awareness across real business needs.

This page highlights the kind of work I enjoy most: building responsive, user-focused interfaces
              that turn design direction into real production experiences.

While the projects vary by platform, they share the same goal — clean UI implementation,
              maintainable frontend structure, strong usability, and full-stack awareness where needed.

A curated set of freelance projects where I led frontend implementation, responsive layout execution,
          CMS configuration, and user-focused web delivery. These builds reflect my approach to UI engineering:
          clean interfaces, maintainable structure, and polished production-ready experiences.

A responsive marketing website built to support clear user flow, polished visual presentation,
                and conversion-focused design. Developed in Squarespace with attention to layout quality,
                performance, and mobile usability.

A WordPress business website designed to communicate trust, clarity, and ease of navigation.
                Focused on responsive structure, accessible content presentation, and a stronger customer-facing experience.

A travel-focused web experience currently in development, centered on modern presentation,
                service clarity, and conversion-minded UI structure within Squarespace.

A selection of client websites I supported through UI implementation, component updates, CMS-driven builds,
          responsive refinements, and production-ready frontend execution across HubSpot and WordPress.

pages.title: Privacy Policy | Daniel Myers
preview: This Privacy Policy explains how information is collected and used when you contact Daniel Myers through this website.

If you submit the contact form, you may provide your name, email address, subject, and message content. This site does not
        collect payment information.

Information submitted through the contact form is used only to respond to your inquiry and communicate about potential work.
        I do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

Contact form submissions are processed by a third-party form service (Formspree) to deliver messages and store submissions.
        Please review their policies if you have questions about their processing practices.
Messages may be retained for reference and follow-up. If you would like your message removed, you can request deletion by emailingdanielx001@gmail.com.
Reasonable steps are taken to protect your information, but no website transmission or storage method is 100% secure.
This policy may be updated occasionally. Last updated:February 2026.
